mapper.select: SELECT id, object_uuid, sha256, md5, size_bytes, mime_type, storage_provider, bucket_name, object_key, storage_class, created_at, updated_at FROM storage_objects WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO storage_objects (object_uuid, sha256, md5, size_bytes, mime_type, storage_provider, bucket_name, object_key, storage_class, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{objectUuid}, #{sha256}, #{md5}, #{sizeBytes}, #{mimeType}, #{storageProvider}, #{bucketName}, #{objectKey}, #{storageClass}, NOW(), NOW())
